creator: smars@yuntech.edu.tw
text:
Projects cannot be saved. See also "ports/183463: cad/meshlab: cannot import .ply or .obj meshes" If data cannot be imported and results cannot be saved... it becomes difficult to use the program.

How-To-Repeat: 1> Open meshlab
2> Load some mesh: .xyz data for instance
3> File -> Save Project
type a file name, then either:
- press on cancel (with *.mlp or *.aln file type)
- press on save (with *.mlp or *.aln file type)
4> The program crashes and the data is not saved

If no mesh is loaded, the problem is the same
